examples: Thousands of retirees were persuaded to mortgage their homes to invest in speculative bonds.
She cast a speculative look at Kate.
The papers ran speculative stories about the mysterious disappearance of Eddie Donagan.
Speculative-grade bond defaults were barely 2% in the fourth quarter, according to the agency.
We could be underestimating this as speculative activities were largely not present in 1990-91.
